title: New X phishing scam copies real login alerts down to the pixel to hijack accounts
summary: Scammers are sending phishing emails that are near-exact replicas of X’s legitimate login notifications, warning recipients of a login “ from a new device ” in a location they have never been.
caption: output/2026-07-20/new-x-phishing-scam-copies-real-login-alerts-down-to-the-pixel-to-hija.txt
